text: The hours pass and I'm still here, missing you
source_text: las horas pasan y yo sigo aquí, extrañándote

text: as a vice that ties me to you, I still wish you
source_text: como un vicio que me amarra a ti, yo sigo deseándote

text: and when the night goes down, I figure you're with me, I can't live if I don't have you
source_text: y cuando cae la noche, yo imagino que estás conmigo, no puedo vivir si no te tengo

text: you start kissing me, I swear I don't wanna wake up about reality
source_text: tú me comienzas a besar, te juro que no quiero despertar sobre la realidad

text: That just a dream, that I don't have you
source_text: que solo un sueño, que no te tengo

text: That just a dream, that I don't have you
source_text: que solo un sueño, que no te tengo

text: I have been pounding his pillow and I haven't been up, and I have been dreaming that I'm stopping and I have a pain because that's not true.
source_text: abrazando la almohada y no despierto, soñando que detengo me duele porque no es cierto

text: I swear I wanted to own you, and I have to run with me and I have only your dream
source_text: mike te juro que quisiera ser tu dueño, que conmigo maneja y solo te tengo el sueño

text: That's how bad I miss you. That's how bad I get.
source_text: uno sabe cuanto te extraño, me hace daño, los días hacen meses y los meses hacen años

text: how they hurt not to have you, to lose you and only in my dream have you
source_text: como duelen en no tenerte, a ti perderte y solamente en mi sueño tenerte

text: and when the night goes down, I figure you're with me, I can't live if I don't have you
source_text: y cuando cae la noche, yo imagino que estás conmigo, no puedo vivir si no te tengo

text: you start kissing me, I swear I don't wanna wake up about reality
source_text: tú me comienzas a besar, te juro que no quiero despertar sobre la realidad

text: That just a dream, that I don't have you
source_text: que solo un sueño, que no te tengo

text: That just a dream, that I don't have you
source_text: que solo un sueño, que no te tengo

text: That's just passing and I'm still here, here, releasing you
source_text: que solo pasan y yo sigo aquí, aquí, estrenándote

text: as a vice that ties me to you, I still wish you
source_text: como un vicio que me amarra a ti, yo sigo deseándote

text: That I have to have a good time with him at his place, but I have to understand.
source_text: que pa' pasarlo en el ronco, quiero comprenderlo, pero

text: That I haven't run out, actually
source_text: que no se me acabo, de hecho
